modal.label: Modal
modal.description: Overlay modal with backdrop and focus management. Programmatically controlled via observed data-visual-open / data-visual-closed attributes.

slots.name: default
slots.description: Modal content (any markup). Use the default slot — no named slot.

attrs.name: data-layout-hidden
attrs.description: Initial state. Set to true so the modal starts hidden.

attrs.name: data-visual-open
attrs.description: Observed — setting to true opens the modal.

attrs.name: data-visual-closed
attrs.description: Observed — setting to true closes the modal.

modal.notes: Open/close by mutating the observed attributes from JS (e.g. `el.setAttribute('data-visual-open', 'true')`).

scroll-top.label: Scroll to Top
scroll-top.description: Floating scroll-to-top button. Appears after the user scrolls down and smoothly returns to the top when clicked.

attrs.name: data-layout-fixed
attrs.description: Fixed viewport positioning when present; absolute positioning when omitted.

scroll-top.notes: Usually placed once per page, near the end of the body.

logo.label: Boxed Logo
logo.description: Boxed logo display for partner logos, department logos, or sponsor grids.

slots.name: default
slots.description: Optional text content alongside the logo.

attrs.name: data-visual
attrs.description: Add a border around the logo box.

logo.notes: This is umd-element-logo, NOT the site header `slot="logo"` anchor. Use this for logo grids, not site branding.

media-gif.label: Accessible GIF
media-gif.description: Wraps an animated GIF with a play/pause toggle for accessible motion control (respects prefers-reduced-motion).
media-gif.notes: Required whenever you embed an animated GIF on a page — users must be able to pause motion.

events-date.label: Event Date Lockup
events-date.description: Formatted date sign / event date lockup that renders start and end dates in a responsive, prominent format. Typically paired with an event title. See registry-cards.json for the fuller entry — duplicated here as part of the layout utility set.

slots.name: start-date-iso
slots.description: Start date as a time element with ISO datetime.

slots.name: end-date-iso
slots.description: End date as a time element with ISO datetime.

events-date.notes: IMPORTANT: slot names are `start-date-iso` and `end-date-iso` (NOT `date-start-iso` / `date-end-iso` as shown in the upstream JSDoc — that's a documentation bug). The component queries the former via Slots.name.DATE_START_ISO which resolves to `start-date-iso`.
